description_long: This is a rectangular table with a light wood-grain top and four sturdy, black legs positioned at each corner. The tabletop has a smooth, flat surface with subtle wood texture, providing a modern and minimalist appearance. The legs are thick and straight, made of a material that appears to be either painted metal or dark-finished wood, giving the table a robust and stable stance. There are no visible drawers, handles, or decorative elements, emphasizing its functional and utilitarian design. The table is of standard height, suitable for use in communal or work settings such as parks, public plazas, or outdoor cafes. Its clean lines and neutral color palette make it versatile for various urban environments.
description: A modern rectangular table with a light wood-grain top and four thick, black legs, featuring a minimalist and sturdy design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the light wood tabletop and all four black legs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the tabletop and the thickness of the two visible black legs.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually identical to the front, displaying the tabletop and all four legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, showing the tabletop depth and two legs.
